simSettings.title: SIM Settings Configuration
simSettings.description: Configure the simulation environment settings for testing this hypothesis
simSettings.descriptionDetail: Configure the agent classes and environment modules that will be used to test this hypothesis in the simulation experiment. These settings define the simulation environment for validating your research hypothesis.

agentClasses.title: Agent Classes
agentClasses.description: Select the agent classes that will participate in the simulation to test this hypothesis.
agentClasses.hint: Click on a card to view full description

envModules.title: Environment Modules
envModules.description: Select the environment modules that will be used to create the simulation environment for testing this hypothesis.
envModules.hint: Click on a card to view full description

simSettings.loading: Loading agent classes and environment modules...

note.title: Note:
note.text1: The selected agent classes and environment modules define the simulation environment that will be used to test and validate this hypothesis.
note.text2: These settings determine what types of agents will participate in the simulation and what environmental conditions they will interact with.
note.text3: Changes will be saved to SIM_SETTINGS.json automatically.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.placeholder: Enter your question or request... (Shift+Enter for new line)

prefillParams.title: Prefill Parameters
prefillParams.selectClass: Select a class to view its prefill parameters

classInfo.noPrefillParams: This class does not have any prefill parameters configured.

errorMessages.backendDisconnected: Backend service is not connected, please start the backend service first

replay.noDataHint: This experiment doesn't have any recorded simulation steps. Make sure the simulation was run with replay recording enabled.

left.selectAgent: Select an Agent on the map to view details
left.name: Name

right.selectTableHint: Select a table to view data

placeholder.noLocationHint: Agents without MobilitySpace environment won't have position data
placeholder.mapIntegrationHint: For interactive map visualization with DeckGL and Mapbox, install the required dependencies:

configPage.title: AI Social Scientist Configuration
configPage.subtitle: Configure your AgentSociety workspace environment
configPage.description: Configure your environment step by step, each step can be saved individually

analysis.title: Data Analysis LLM
analysis.hint: For data analysis, insight generation, and report writing

python.title: Python Environment
python.pathPlaceholder: python3 or leave empty for auto-detection

configPage.noWorkspaceHint: Please open a workspace folder first (File > Open Folder)

llm.apiKeyRequiredHint: For core functions like default chat, analysis, etc.

backend.title: Backend Service Configuration
backend.hint: Port will be auto-allocated, Python path auto-detects if empty

coder.title: Code Generation LLM (optional)
coder.hint: Dedicated model for code generation, falls back to default LLM if empty
coder.apiBase: Code Generation LLM API Base URL

embedding.title: Embedding Model
embedding.hint: For text embedding, falls back to default LLM if empty
embedding.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to use default LLM key
embedding.apiBasePlaceholder: Leave empty to use default LLM URL

nano.title: High-Frequency LLM (optional)
nano.hint: Lightweight model for high-frequency fast operations

easypaper.title: EasyPaper (optional)
easypaper.llmApiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty if same as default LLM
easypaper.vlmApiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty if same as LLM API Key

finish.title: Configuration Complete!
finish.description: All configurations have been saved to the workspace's .env file.
finish.hint: Click the button below to start the backend service.

notifications.saveSuccessDesc: Configuration has been saved to .env file
notifications.llmKeyRequiredDesc: Please enter LLM API key to continue
notifications.apiBaseMissing: Please enter LLM API Base URL

validation.failed: Validation failed, please check API key and base URL
validation.emptyApiKey: API Key or Base URL is empty
validation.invalidKey: API Key is invalid or expired
validation.invalidUrl: API address is incorrect. Please check if the address includes /v1 path
validation.connectionFailed: Cannot connect to API address. Please check network or API address
validation.timeout: Request timed out, please check network connection or API address
